ranged_attack.name: Ranged Attack
ranged_attack.description: Attacks with your equipped ranged weapon.

heroic_strike.name: Heroic Strike
heroic_strike.description: A powerful melee strike that deals increased damage and generates additional threat.

battle_shout.name: Battle Shout
battle_shout.description: Increases the attack power of all party members for 12 turns.

charge.name: Charge
charge.description: Charges an enemy, dealing damage, stunning them, and generating rage. Only usable on the first turn of combat.

rend.name: Rend
rend.description: Inflicts a bleeding wound dealing physical damage over 3 turns.

thunder_clap.name: Thunder Clap
thunder_clap.description: Strikes all nearby enemies, dealing damage and reducing their attack power for 3 turns.

victory_rush.name: Victory Rush
victory_rush.description: Deals damage. Only usable in the first two turns of combat following a victorious battle.

hamstring.name: Hamstring
hamstring.description: Hamstrings the target, greatly increasing your chance to escape this encounter.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.description: Taunts the target, greatly increasing your threat and forcing their attention.

bloodrage.name: Bloodrage
bloodrage.description: Drains 16 health to generate 10 rage immediately, then generates additional rage over 3 turns.

sunder_armor.name: Sunder Armor
sunder_armor.description: Reduces the target's armor. Stacks up to 5 times. Generates high threat.

overpower.name: Overpower
overpower.description: Exploits an opening to deal increased damage. Only usable if the target dealt no damage last turn.

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Bashes the target with your shield, dealing damage, stunning them, and interrupting any ongoing cast. Requires a shield.

revenge.name: Revenge
revenge.description: Retaliates after successfully avoiding all incoming damage last turn.

demoralizing_shout.name: Demoralizing Shout
demoralizing_shout.description: Reduces the melee attack power of all nearby enemies for 4 turns.

mocking_blow.name: Mocking Blow
mocking_blow.description: A taunting strike that deals damage and generates very high threat.

disarm.name: Disarm
disarm.description: Disarms the target, preventing them from making melee attacks for 2 turns.

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.description: A sweeping attack that strikes your target and 1-2 additional nearby enemies.

retaliation.name: Retaliation
retaliation.description: For the next 2 turns, automatically counter-attack every time you are struck.

intimidating_shout.name: Intimidating Shout
intimidating_shout.description: Causes all enemies to flee in terror, preventing them from acting for 2 turns.

execute.name: Execute
execute.description: Executes a weakened enemy for massive damage. Only usable below 20% health. Consumes all remaining rage for bonus damage.

challenging_shout.name: Challenging Shout
challenging_shout.description: Forces all nearby enemies to focus on you, generating high threat against all of them.

shield_wall.name: Shield Wall
shield_wall.description: Reduces all damage taken by 60% for 3 turns. Requires a shield.

slam.name: Slam
slam.description: A powerful melee strike that requires one turn to wind up.

intercept.name: Intercept
intercept.description: Charges an enemy mid-combat, dealing damage, stunning them, and generating rage.

berserker_rage.name: Berserker Rage
berserker_rage.description: Removes all debuffs and generates bonus rage when struck for 2 turns.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.description: Unleashes a whirlwind of steel, striking all nearby enemies.

pummel.name: Pummel
pummel.description: Strikes the target for minor damage and interrupts any ongoing cast.

shield_slam.name: Shield Slam
shield_slam.description: Slams the target with your shield for high damage and threat, removing one of their buffs. Requires a shield.

recklessness.name: Recklessness
recklessness.description: Your next 3 attacks are guaranteed critical strikes, but you take 20% more damage for 3 turns.

spell_reflection.name: Spell Reflection
spell_reflection.description: The next spell cast against you is reflected back at the caster. Requires a shield.

commanding_shout.name: Commanding Shout
commanding_shout.description: Increases the maximum health of all party members by 80 for 10 turns.

intervene.name: Intervene
intervene.description: Intercedes for a party member, absorbing the next hit they would receive onto yourself.

shattering_throw.name: Shattering Throw
shattering_throw.description: Hurls your weapon at the target, dealing damage, reducing their armor, and stripping a buff — prioritizing any invulnerability effects.

enraged_regeneration.name: Enraged Regeneration
enraged_regeneration.description: Regenerates 30% of maximum health over 2 turns.

heroic_throw.name: Heroic Throw
heroic_throw.description: Hurls your weapon at the target for solid damage and high threat.

power_smash.name: Power Smash
power_smash.description: A heavy smash that deals increased damage.

moonfire.name: Moonfire
moonfire.description: Calls down a burst of energy, dealing nature damage and leaving a nature DoT.

shadow_bolt.name: Shadow Bolt
shadow_bolt.description: Hurls a bolt of dark magic at the target.

immolate.name: Immolate
immolate.description: Causes the target to burn, dealing fire damage instantly and over time.

lesser_heal.name: Lesser Heal
lesser_heal.description: A slow but efficient heal on a friendly target.

smite.name: Smite
smite.description: Smites an enemy with holy energy.

power_word_fortitude.name: Power Word: Fortitude
power_word_fortitude.description: Fortifies a friendly target, increasing their maximum health for 30 turns.

shadow_word_pain.name: Shadow Word: Pain
shadow_word_pain.description: A painful shadow curse that deals damage over time.

power_word_shield.name: Power Word: Shield
power_word_shield.description: Shields a friendly target, absorbing the next 80+ damage taken.

fade.name: Fade
fade.description: Temporarily removes the priest from enemy threat tables for 2 turns.

renew.name: Renew
renew.description: Renews a friendly target, healing them over 5 turns.

mind_blast.name: Mind Blast
mind_blast.description: Blasts the target's mind with shadow energy, dealing high damage.

resurrection.name: Resurrection
resurrection.description: Resurrects a fallen ally to half health. Cannot be cast during combat.

inner_fire.name: Inner Fire
inner_fire.description: Infuses the priest with holy power, greatly increasing armor for 20 turns.

psychic_scream.name: Psychic Scream
psychic_scream.description: Lets out a psychic scream, causing the two nearest enemies to flee in terror.

cure_disease.name: Cure Disease
cure_disease.description: Removes a disease effect from a friendly target.

dispel_magic.name: Dispel Magic
dispel_magic.description: Removes a magical buff from an enemy or a magical debuff from an ally.

fear_ward.name: Fear Ward
fear_ward.description: Wards a friendly target against the next fear effect for 20 turns.

holy_nova.name: Holy Nova
holy_nova.description: Emits a burst of holy energy, damaging all enemies and healing all allies.

shackle_undead.name: Shackle Undead
shackle_undead.description: Shackles an undead target, stunning it for 3 turns.

devouring_plague.name: Devouring Plague
devouring_plague.description: Afflicts the target with a shadow plague that deals damage and heals the caster per tick.

holy_fire.name: Holy Fire
holy_fire.description: Consumes the enemy in holy flames, dealing holy damage and leaving a burn.

healing_wave.name: Healing Wave
healing_wave.description: A slow but powerful single-target heal.

lightning_bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning_bolt.description: Hurls a bolt of lightning at the target.

rockbiter_weapon.name: Rockbiter Weapon
rockbiter_weapon.description: Imbues the weapon with stone, increasing attack power for 30 turns. Only one weapon enchant at a time.

earth_shock.name: Earth Shock
earth_shock.description: Strikes with earth energy, dealing nature damage and reducing the target's attack power for 2 turns.

stoneskin_totem.name: Stoneskin Totem
stoneskin_totem.description: Earth totem. Increases armor of all party members for the encounter. Replaces other earth totems.

earthbind_totem.name: Earthbind Totem
earthbind_totem.description: Earth totem. Improves the party's chance to successfully flee. Replaces other earth totems.

lightning_shield.name: Lightning Shield
lightning_shield.description: Surrounds the shaman in lightning. When struck, zaps the attacker for nature damage. 3 charges, 10 turns.

stoneclaw_totem.name: Stoneclaw Totem
stoneclaw_totem.description: Earth totem. Absorbs the next small amount of damage the shaman takes. Replaces other earth totems.

flametongue_weapon.name: Flametongue Weapon
flametongue_weapon.description: Imbues the weapon with flame, increasing spell and ability damage for 30 turns. Only one weapon enchant at a time.

searing_totem.name: Searing Totem
searing_totem.description: Fire totem. Deals periodic fire damage to the target until the encounter ends. Replaces other fire totems.

strength_of_earth_totem.name: Strength of Earth Totem
strength_of_earth_totem.description: Earth totem. Increases attack power of all party members for the encounter. Replaces other earth totems.

flame_shock.name: Flame Shock
flame_shock.description: Sends a flame shock at the target, dealing fire damage and leaving a fire DoT.

raptor_strike.name: Raptor Strike
raptor_strike.description: A powerful melee strike that deals increased physical damage.

track_beasts.name: Track Beasts
track_beasts.description: Track beasts. The next encounter will be with a skinnable beast.

serpent_sting.name: Serpent Sting
serpent_sting.description: Poisons the target, dealing nature damage each turn.

aspect_of_the_monkey.name: Aspect of the Monkey
aspect_of_the_monkey.description: The hunter mimics the monkey, increasing dodge chance for 30 turns. Only one aspect may be active at a time.

hunters_mark.name: Hunter's Mark
hunters_mark.description: Marks the target, causing them to take increased damage.

arcane_shot.name: Arcane Shot
arcane_shot.description: Fires an arcane-charged shot at the target.

concussive_shot.name: Concussive Shot
concussive_shot.description: Stuns the target momentarily, increasing the hunter's chance to escape.

aspect_of_the_hawk.name: Aspect of the Hawk
aspect_of_the_hawk.description: The hunter takes on the aspect of the hawk, increasing attack power for 30 turns. Only one aspect may be active at a time.

track_humanoids.name: Track Humanoids
track_humanoids.description: Track humanoids. The next encounter will be with a humanoid enemy.

distracting_shot.name: Distracting Shot
distracting_shot.description: A distracting shot that draws heavy enemy attention onto the hunter.

wing_clip.name: Wing Clip
wing_clip.description: Clips the target's wings, dealing damage and increasing the hunter's chance to escape.

scare_beast.name: Scare Beast
scare_beast.description: Frightens a beast, preventing it from acting for 2 turns.

immolation_trap.name: Immolation Trap
immolation_trap.description: Plants a trap that burns the first enemy to trigger it.

mongoose_bite.name: Mongoose Bite
mongoose_bite.description: A swift melee counterattack dealing heavy physical damage.

seal_of_righteousness.name: Seal of Righteousness
seal_of_righteousness.description: Fills the paladin with holy power, adding holy damage to each melee attack for 5 turns.

holy_light.name: Holy Light
holy_light.description: Calls upon holy power to heal a friendly target.

devotion_aura.name: Devotion Aura
devotion_aura.description: Gives armor to all party members. Only one aura can be active per paladin at a time.

judgement.name: Judgement
judgement.description: Unleashes the energy of a Seal to judge an enemy, dealing holy damage and consuming the active seal.

blessing_of_might.name: Blessing of Might
blessing_of_might.description: Blesses a party member, increasing their attack power. Only one blessing per target.

divine_protection.name: Divine Protection
divine_protection.description: Reduces damage taken by 50% for 3 turns.

purify.name: Purify
purify.description: Removes a disease or poison effect from a friendly target.

hand_of_protection.name: Hand of Protection
hand_of_protection.description: Makes a party member invulnerable for 2 turns, but they cannot act.

lay_on_hands.name: Lay on Hands
lay_on_hands.description: Channels holy power to fully heal a friendly target. 20 turn cooldown.

redemption.name: Redemption
redemption.description: Revives a fallen party member to 50% health. Costs all of the caster's mana.

pick_lock.name: Pick Lock
pick_lock.description: Grants the Lockpicking skill, enabling you to open locked chests.

sinister_strike.name: Sinister Strike
sinister_strike.description: A vicious strike dealing increased damage and generating 1 combo point.

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.description: Enter stealth, becoming untargetable by enemies. Breaks when you use an ability.

eviscerate.name: Eviscerate
eviscerate.description: Deals heavy damage that scales with and spends all combo points.

pick_pocket.name: Pick Pocket
pick_pocket.description: Steal gold from an enemy while in stealth.

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.description: A massive strike from stealth. Requires stealth. 4 turn cooldown.

gouge.name: Gouge
gouge.description: Deals small damage and stuns the target for 1 turn. 3 turn cooldown.

evasion.name: Evasion
evasion.description: Greatly increases dodge chance for 3 turns. 10 turn cooldown.

sap.name: Sap
sap.description: Stuns a humanoid for 4 turns. Opener only, requires stealth. Breaks on damage.

sprint.name: Sprint
sprint.description: Increases escape chance by 10% for 1 turn. 5 turn cooldown.

slice_and_dice.name: Slice and Dice
slice_and_dice.description: Grants 2 actions per turn for X turns, where X equals combo points spent.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: Hurls a ball of fire at the target. 1 turn cast time.

arcane_intellect.name: Arcane Intellect
arcane_intellect.description: Increases the target's Intellect, boosting spell power. Lasts 30 turns.

frost_armor.name: Frost Armor
frost_armor.description: Encases the mage in frost, increasing armor and chilling melee attackers. Only one armor spell at a time.

frostbolt.name: Frostbolt
frostbolt.description: Launches a shard of frost at the enemy. Increases escape chance by 10%.

conjure_water.name: Conjure Water
conjure_water.description: Conjures water that restores 40% mana to all living party members.

fire_blast.name: Fire Blast
fire_blast.description: An instant blast of fire. 2 turn cooldown.

conjure_food.name: Conjure Food
conjure_food.description: Conjures food that restores 40% HP to all living party members.

polymorph.name: Polymorph
polymorph.description: Transforms an enemy into a harmless critter for 2 turns. Only affects beasts, humanoids, and critters. 3 turn cooldown.

arcane_missiles.name: Arcane Missiles
arcane_missiles.description: Launches a volley of arcane missiles at the target.

frost_nova.name: Frost Nova
frost_nova.description: Erupts in frost, damaging and stunning all enemies for 1 turn. Increases escape chance by 20%. 5 turn cooldown.

demon_skin.name: Demon Skin
demon_skin.description: Armor spell. Increases armor and healing received.

corruption.name: Corruption
corruption.description: Corrupts the target, dealing shadow damage over 6 turns.

curse_of_weakness.name: Curse of Weakness
curse_of_weakness.description: Curses the target, reducing melee attack power and armor. Only one curse per target.

curse_of_agony.name: Curse of Agony
curse_of_agony.description: Curses the target with increasing shadow pain over 12 turns. Only one curse per target.

warlock_fear.name: Fear
warlock_fear.description: Sends the enemy fleeing in terror for 2 turns. 3 turn cooldown.

drain_soul.name: Drain Soul
drain_soul.description: Drains the target's soul, dealing shadow damage. Deals double damage at or below 25% HP. Awards a Soul Shard on kill.

create_healthstone.name: Create Healthstone
create_healthstone.description: Creates a Healthstone consumable. Only one can be held at a time. Disappears if the warlock dies.

healing_touch.name: Healing Touch
healing_touch.description: A slow but potent heal on a friendly target.

mark_of_the_wild.name: Mark of the Wild
mark_of_the_wild.description: Increases the target's stats and armor for 30 turns.

wrath.name: Wrath
wrath.description: Hurls a ball of nature energy at the target.

thorns.name: Thorns
thorns.description: Causes nature damage to attackers who strike the target with melee attacks.

entangling_roots.name: Entangling Roots
entangling_roots.description: Roots the target, dealing nature damage over 4 turns. Increases escape chance by 10%.

bear_form.name: Bear Form
bear_form.description: Shapeshift into bear form, greatly increasing armor, health, and attack power. Breaks movement impairing effects. Instant — you may act again this turn.

maul.name: Maul
maul.description: A heavy blow dealing increased damage and generating high threat. Requires bear form.

growl.name: Growl
growl.description: Taunts the target to attack you. Requires bear form. 8 turn cooldown.

demoralizing_roar.name: Demoralizing Roar
demoralizing_roar.description: Reduces the melee attack power of all enemies. Requires bear form.

dust_cloud.name: Dust Cloud
dust_cloud.description: Kicks up a blinding cloud of dust, reducing all opponents' chance to hit by 30% for 5 turns.

boar_charge.name: Charge
boar_charge.description: Charges the target, dealing bonus physical damage.

rushing_charge.name: Rushing Charge
rushing_charge.description: Charges the target, dealing bonus physical damage.

scorpid_poison.name: Scorpid Poison
scorpid_poison.description: Injects venom that eats away at the target over time.

scorpid_sting.name: Scorpid Sting
scorpid_sting.description: A painful sting that deals nature damage and poisons the target.

venom_sting.name: Venom Sting
venom_sting.description: Drives a venom-slicked stinger deep into the target, dealing nature damage and leaving a potent toxin that continues to burn through the target's veins.

shadow_bolt_minor.name: Shadow Bolt
shadow_bolt_minor.description: A small bolt of shadow energy hurled at the target.

razormane_quills.name: Razor Mane
razormane_quills.description: The quilboar's razor-sharp quills bristle with natural energy, dealing nature damage to any attacker that strikes them in melee.

faerie_fire.name: Faerie Fire
faerie_fire.description: Surrounds the target with a faint aura of nature energy, reducing armor and preventing stealth for 8 turns.

burning_ember.name: Burning Ember
burning_ember.description: Burns the target for fire damage each turn.

improved_blocking.name: Improved Blocking
improved_blocking.description: The battleguard raises its guard, greatly increasing its chance to dodge incoming attacks for 3 turns.

fanatic_blade.name: Fanatic Blade
fanatic_blade.description: The fanatic channels fire into their blade, causing melee attacks to deal bonus fire damage for 8 turns.

quick_sidestep.name: Quick Sidestep
quick_sidestep.description: The crawler deftly sidesteps incoming blows, greatly increasing its chance to dodge for 3 turns.

lizard_bolt.name: Lizard Bolt
lizard_bolt.description: Hurls a crackling bolt of nature energy at a single target.

shrink.name: Shrink
shrink.description: Zalazane channels dark voodoo to shrink his target, reducing their Strength and Stamina by 1 for 20 turns.

noxious_catalyst.name: Noxious Catalyst
noxious_catalyst.description: Saturates the target with corrosive venom, reducing their nature resistance by 45 for 20 turns.

decayed_strength.name: Decayed Strength
decayed_strength.description: The corrupted surf crawler secretes a corrosive toxin, reducing the target's Strength by 18 for 20 turns.

decayed_agility.name: Decayed Agility
decayed_agility.description: The corrupted crocolisk's festering bite seeps with decay, reducing the target's Agility by 18 for 20 turns.

soul_siphon.name: Soul Siphon
soul_siphon.description: Siphons dark energy through two targets, dealing shadow damage to both and healing the caster.

pet_bite.name: Bite
pet_bite.description: Bites the enemy, dealing physical damage.

pet_claw.name: Claw
pet_claw.description: Slashes the enemy with sharp claws for heavy physical damage.

pet_growl.name: Growl
pet_growl.description: Growls menacingly, drawing the attention of all enemies.

pet_charge.name: Charge
pet_charge.description: Charges an enemy, dealing damage and stunning them briefly.

pet_frenzy.name: Frenzy
pet_frenzy.description: Enters a frenzy, greatly increasing attack power for 4 turns.

pet_screech.name: Screech
pet_screech.description: Lets out a piercing screech that reduces all enemies' attack power.

pet_firebolt.name: Firebolt
pet_firebolt.description: Hurls a bolt of fire at the target.

pet_torment.name: Torment
pet_torment.description: Lashes all enemies with void energy, generating massive threat.

pet_consume_shadows.name: Consume Shadows
pet_consume_shadows.description: Draws in void energy to regenerate health.

pet_seethe.name: Seethe
pet_seethe.description: A vicious strike fueled by demonic rage.

pet_spell_lock.name: Spell Lock
pet_spell_lock.description: Locks down an enemy's spellcasting and silences them.

pet_lightning_breath.name: Lightning Breath
pet_lightning_breath.description: Breathes arcs of lightning that strike two enemies.
